allow: PowerShell($phpPath = "C:\\php"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $phpPath\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $phpPath -Force | Out-Null }; Write-Host "Downloading PHP 8.2..."; $ProgressPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; \(New-Object Net.WebClient\).DownloadFile\("https://windows.php.net/downloads/releases/php-8.2.20-nts-Win32-x64.zip", "$phpPath.zip"\); Write-Host "Extracting..."; Expand-Archive -Path "$phpPath.zip" -DestinationPath $phpPath -Force; Write-Host "Downloading Composer..."; \(New-Object Net.WebClient\).DownloadFile\("https://getcomposer.org/download/latest-stable/composer.phar", "$phpPath\\composer.phar"\); Write-Host "Done!")
